code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let all = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(all, "\n")
  mut found = false
  mut result = ""
  for line in lines
    if not found
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        result = trimmed
        found = true
      end
    end
  end
  if found
    println(result)
  else
    println("(none)")
  end
end
